assets.name: lecture_06_figure_02.png
assets.rationale: Candidate 02 gives the clearest and most balanced view of the relevant board writing: the Lagrangian symbol and equality are fully visible, the factor of –m is clear, and the square-root expression has begun far enough to document the structure while being slightly less cropped and less motion-soft than the later frames. Candidate 01 includes more unrelated left-board residue and a less stable pointing gesture, while candidates 03 and 04 do not materially improve completeness and are a bit more presenter-dominant.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: to the derivative of the Lagrangian,

assets.name: lecture_06_figure_04.png
assets.rationale: Candidate 03 gives the clearest view of the two relevant equations on the right board with the least hand occlusion. The lecturer is no longer covering the lower denominator, and both the angular-momentum relation above and the energy equation below are readable enough to support a clean typeset reconstruction. Candidate 01 is more obstructed by the pointing gesture, candidate 02 is still transitioning out of that gesture, and candidate 04 is slightly more presenter-dominant without improving the board content.
